category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Switzerland EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入瑞士：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入瑞士：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Switzerland CE-aligned product requirements, IEC/EN 61851 safety routes, ElCom and Swissgrid operational context, OCPP and backend integration, Type 2/CCS2 connector readiness, and transport compliance.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与瑞士CE对齐产品要求、IEC/EN 61851安全路径、ElCom与Swissgrid运营背景、OCPP与后台集成、Type 2/CCS2接口准备及运输合规的对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與瑞士CE對齊產品要求、IEC/EN 61851安全路徑、ElCom與Swissgrid運營背景、OCPP與後台整合、Type 2/CCS2接口準備及運輸合規的對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, CE scope determination, market-access decision, or product launch clearance. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Switzerland requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, operation, billing integration, and site commissioning.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、CE适用范围裁定、市场准入决定或产品上市许可。出口商、进口商、网路运营方和安装方在出货、销售、运行、计费系统接入和站点调试前应与合格瑞士专业人士核实现行瑞士要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、CE適用範圍裁定、市場准入決定或產品上市許可。出口商、進口商、網路營運方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、運行、計費系統接入和站點調試前應與合格瑞士專業人士核實現行瑞士要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Switzerland, the practical gap is separating product conformity from site and service readiness. Focus on CE technical-file route under SNV-aligned standards, IEC 61851-1 / 62124 for electrical safety, Type 2 and CCS2 connector configuration, OCPP interoperability for backend operations, Swissgrid and operator-side grid coordination, and 230/400 V 50 Hz project setup.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩出口瑞士时，主要差距在于把产品合规与现场/服务就绪分开处理。重点是按SNV采标标准建立CE技术文件路径、IEC 61851-1/62124电气安全、Type 2与CCS2接口配置、用于后台运营的OCPP互操作、Swissgrid及运营侧并网协调、以及230/400 V、50 Hz项目配置。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁出口瑞士時，主要差距在於將產品符合性與現場／服務就緒分開處理。重點是按SNV採標標準建立CE技術文件路徑、IEC 61851-1/62124電氣安全、Type 2與CCS2接口配置、用於後台營運的OCPP互操作、Swissgrid及營運側併網協調，以及230/400 V、50 Hz項目配置。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, government service, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
